name: Rope Trick
description: You touch a rope. One end of it hovers upward until the rope hangs perpendicular to the ground or the rope reaches a ceiling. At the rope's upper end, an Invisible 3-foot-by-5-foot portal opens to an extradimensional space that lasts until the spell ends. That space can be reached by climbing the rope, which can be pulled into or dropped out of it. The extradimensional space can hold as many as eight Medium or smaller creatures. Spells and attacks can't cross through the portal in either direction, though those inside the space can see out of it as if through a 3-foot-by-5-foot window.
